description: Renatus Tactical Acquisition Corp I does not have significant operations. It intends to effecting a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company was incorporated in 2024 and is based in Coral Gables, Florida.
